text.title: Founder Led Qualification Rubric Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree routes observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: How many no's across the 5 checks?

conclusion.verdict: verdict=borderline; schedule 30m additional discovery + re-run within 7d

branch.question: Is evidence present for every yes?

conclusion.verdict: default missing-evidence yeses to no; re-evaluate

text.example: noes=0 → evidence_complete=true → five-binary-checks → qualified → proposal queue.
